ddls:
CREATE TABLE "portfolio_performance" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "max_return" REAL /* Maximum return of the portfolio */,
  "mean_kl" REAL /* Mean KL divergence of the portfolio */,
  "std_return" REAL /* Standard deviation of the portfolio returns */,
  "explained_variance" REAL /* Explained variance of the portfolio returns */,
  "min_return" REAL /* Minimum return of the portfolio */,
  "itr_time" REAL /* Iteration time for the portfolio analysis */,
  "entropy" REAL /* Entropy of the portfolio returns */,
  "max_kl" REAL /* Maximum KL divergence of the portfolio */,
  "total_exec_time" REAL /* Total execution time for the portfolio analysis */,
  "average_return" REAL /* Average return of the portfolio */,
  "time" REAL /* Time taken for the analysis */,
  "loss_after" REAL /* Loss after the portfolio analysis */,
  "average_policy_std" REAL /* Average policy standard deviation */,
  "loss_before" REAL /* Loss before the portfolio analysis */,
  "perplexity" REAL /* Perplexity of the portfolio returns */,
  "num_trajs" INTEGER /* Number of trajectories analyzed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio performance was calculated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio performance was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the investment strategy */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level associated with the strategy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the investment strategy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the investment strategy was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the investment strategy */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the investment strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_strategies_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_strategies_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the financial instrument (e.g., stock, bond, ETF) */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level associated with the instrument */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) for the financial instrument */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector or industry that the financial instrument belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_instruments" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the financial instrument in the portfolio */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date when the financial instrument was allocated to the portfolio */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the allocation (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id", "instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the market condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market condition */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the market condition */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the market condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backtesting_results" (
  "backtest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backtesting result */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio being backtested */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment strategy being backtested */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market condition used in the backtesting */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the backtesting period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the backtesting period */,
  "performance" TEXT /* Performance of the investment strategy under the given market condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the backtesting result was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the backtesting result was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the backtesting result (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backtest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backtesting_results_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES investment_strategies ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backtesting_results_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES market_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backtesting_results_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolio_performance ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the machine learning model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the machine learning model was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the machine learning model */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the machine learning model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_learning_models_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_learning_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio used in the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the performance evaluation period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the performance evaluation period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model performance was calculated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model performance was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model performance (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolio_performance ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_comments_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolio_performance ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
